description_long: An elderly man stands upright with arms slightly bent at his sides, wearing a textured red button-up sweater and olive green trousers. His hair is short, neatly styled, and gray, complementing his mature appearance. He wears rectangular eyeglasses and has a calm, neutral facial expression with visible wrinkles, indicating age. The outfit is completed with a brown belt and matching brown shoes, both of which appear sturdy and practical. The figure's build is average, and his posture is straight, suggesting a healthy, active individual. The clothing and accessories are typical for an older adult in an urban environment, suitable for casual outings or daily errands.
description: An elderly man with short gray hair, glasses, a red sweater, olive green pants, and brown shoes stands upright with a calm expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's face, glasses, red sweater with buttons, olive green pants, brown belt, and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his face, the fit of his sweater and pants, and the side of his shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of his head, the full back of the red sweater, olive pants, and brown shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of his face, side of the sweater, pants, and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual attire consisting of a textured red button-up sweater, olive green trousers, brown belt, and brown shoes; no visible accessories beyond eyeglasses.
attribute_facial_features: rectangular eyeglasses, visible wrinkles, calm neutral expression
